name: Rebirth is locked before reaching stage 10
description: The rebirth action must be disabled or refused for a fresh save below stage 10.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify the rebirth confirm control is disabled or clearly marked as requiring stage 10, and activating it does not reset the game
